nodes.name: IF: peta keyword in PeTa group?

main.node: IF: peta keyword in PeTa group?

_setup_instructions._about: Import this JSON into N8N (Workflows → Import from File). Then set the following N8N Environment Variables (Settings → Variables, or .env on the N8N container):

env_vars.PETA_GROUP_JID: <set after bot joins group — copy from Admin → WA Bot UI>

next_steps: 2. Set all the env vars above in N8N (use N8N's Variables UI or container .env).
4. Copy the webhook URL from the Webhook node — looks like https://n8n.46-250-239-138.sslip.io/webhook/wa-incoming
5. In PeTa Admin → WA Bot, paste that URL into 'N8N Webhook URL' field → Save.
6. Scan QR with burner WhatsApp, join PeTa group, copy group JID into Admin UI.
7. Test: ketik 'peta' di grup dari nomor army yang terdaftar → cek user_credits — Rp5K masuk.
